name: Approach
intuition_and_algorithm:
Given an array, traverse through the entire array.
For each element, check if the element is present in the array.

If the element is found, print the index of the element.
If the element is not found, print -1.

complexities.time: O(N) , where N is the number of elements in the array. This is because we traverse the entire array to find the element.
complexities.space: O(1) , as we are using a constant
